---
title: "git_monitor.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/intel/git_monitor.ts"
loc: 58
complexity: 5
logic_score: 6.45
style_score: 4.00
intel_score: 6.14
overall_score: 5.53
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [execa](file://execa)
- [registry](file://../pathRegistry.js)
- [*](file://node:path)

### Exports
- `filepath`
- `GitChronograph`
- `root`
- `relPath`
- `commitStdout`
- `diffStdout`
- `timeStdout`
- `lines7d`
- `stats`
- `match`
- `root`
- `execa`
- `counts`
